ContraCostaMarinNapaGeography.row_predicate: (("county" = 'contra costa county' OR ("county" = 'marin county' OR "county" = 'napa county')) OR (rowid IN (10,22,23,50,63,116,126,127,134,167)))

AlamedaSantaClaraGeography.row_predicate: (("county" = 'alameda county' OR "county" = 'santa clara county') OR (rowid IN (6,13,25,36,37,49,51,82,95,111,112,155,163,165,168)))

cities_other_or_null_county.row_predicate: (("county" IS NULL OR "county" NOT IN ('unknown', 'san mateo county', 'contra costa county', 'alameda county', 'santa clara county', 'sonoma county', 'marin county', 'monterey county', 'napa county')) OR (rowid IN (55,65,81,89,106,124,144,145,146)))

relocation_engine_debug.pair_weight_meaning: Weights count co-occurrences of two fragments (from different original tables) inside workload queries that already span 2+ locals. They rank relocation candidates; they do not equal the number of queries that will become single-local after a move.
